title: Feuilleea glomerulata

This family is part of the larger order Celastrales, which is a group of flowering plants known for their distinct leaf morphology and fruit characteristics. The genus Feuilleea is a small one, and it is primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The species Feuilleea glomerulata is likely to be a tropical or subtropical plant, given the typical climate preferences of its family and genus. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of this species.
